Atención mala . Tardan 1hs para cargarte combustible . Los alrededores de la estación cada ves están pero ..mucha basura .

(Translated by Google)
Bad service. It takes an hour to fill up your tank. The area around the station is getting worse, but... lots of trash.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención del playero Nicolás Bustos, no solo que tarda muchísimo tiempo, sino que también le toma el pelo a los clientes.  Solicite un libro de quejas, y me dieron dos tapas duras con hojas sueltas sin foliar... Una verguenza ACA 25 de mayo. De servicios 0...

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendant Nicolás Bustos was a disaster. Not only is he incredibly slow, but he also treats customers like dirt. I asked for a complaint book, and they gave me two hard covers with loose, unnumbered pages... A disgrace, ACA 25 de Mayo. Zero service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMFBUX3Z3RRAB
